title: NVIDIA Inception Program – Startup Member
subtitle: Startup Member
htmlContent:
NVIDIA Inception is a global acceleration and recognition program created by NVIDIA — one of the world's leading technology companies in AI computing, GPUs, deep learning, and accelerated computing.

The program is designed to support early-stage technology startups that are pushing the boundaries in fields such as:

  • Artificial Intelligence (AI)
  • Machine Learning (ML)
  • Robotics
  • Computer Vision
  • Autonomous Systems
  • High-Performance Computing (HPC)

Participation in NVIDIA Inception is by invite or application approval only, and selected startups gain access to exclusive resources that help them scale technology and business.

MetaOptics at CES 2026: Being recognised as an NVIDIA Inception Program Startup Member at CES 2026 marks two important things for MetaOptics:

1. Industry Recognition at a Premier Global Event

CES (Consumer Electronics Show) is one of the world's largest and most influential technology events. Each year, major global brands, startups, and investors gather there to unveil innovations and partnerships.
Being featured as an NVIDIA Inception Startup at CES means MetaOptics was highlighted among a select group of startups that NVIDIA chose to showcase — a strong endorsement of both technology and commercial relevance.

2. Validation by a Global AI & Computing Leader

NVIDIA does not accept every applicant into the Inception Program – selection is based on:

  • Technical sophistication
  • Relevance to AI / accelerated computing ecosystems
  • Potential for market impact
  • Ability to benefit from and contribute to NVIDIA's ecosystem

Being accepted means MetaOptics' technology was evaluated and deemed strategically aligned with cutting-edge AI, deep learning, or accelerated compute workflows. Being recognised as an NVIDIA Inception Program Startup Member at CES 2026 is prestigious because:

  • It signals that MetaOptics' technology is AI-relevant and future-oriented
  • It places the company in a high-impact global technology ecosystem
  • It enhances credibility with investors, partners, and customers
  • It provides access to world-class support, tools, and compute resources
  • It gives high visibility at a world-class technology exhibition

Essentially, this recognition places MetaOptics among a select group of startups shaping the future of AI, computing, and next-generation technologies, not just locally, but on a global stage.

title:
Design AI & Tech Awards (DAITA) 2025 -
Winner
subtitle: Winner (2025)
htmlContent:
MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was named a winner at the inaugural Design AI and Tech Awards (DAITA) 2025 — a newly established award platform recognising breakthrough innovation at the intersection of:

  • Artificial Intelligence
  • Advanced Technology
  • Industrial & Product Design
  • Engineering Excellence

As an inaugural award edition, DAITA 2025 marks the launch of what is intended to be a recurring recognition platform spotlighting companies shaping the future of AI-enabled technology design.

Winning in the very first edition places MetaOptics among the foundational benchmark companies that set the standard for future award recipients.

title:
Qualcomm AI Program for Innovators –
APAC 2025 Shortlist
subtitle: APAC 2025 Shortlist
modalTitle:
QUALCOMM AI PROGRAM FOR INNOVATORS
APAC 2025 SHORTLIST
htmlContent:
MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was selected as one of the region's most promising AI-driven innovators by one of the world's most influential semiconductor and wireless technology leaders.

This program is not a general participation initiative — it is a selective recognition and acceleration platform designed to identify startups that are:

  • Technically advanced
  • AI-centric or AI-enabling
  • Commercially scalable
  • Strategically aligned with Qualcomm's ecosystem

Receiving the award indicates that MetaOptics met Qualcomm's internal evaluation standards for innovation, execution capability, and ecosystem relevance.

title: SGX Securities – Listing Commemoration Award
subtitle: Listing Commemoration Award
htmlContent:
MetaOptics' successful listing on the SGX Catalist Board on 9th September 2025 marks a transformative milestone in its corporate journey. It provides public market validation, strengthens access to growth capital, enhances brand credibility, and positions the company as a leading Singapore deep-tech innovator in advanced optics and AI-enabled imaging systems.

MetaOptics' stock has shown significant appreciation from its IPO base, with early gains of multiple times the IPO price. This type of performance is notable for a newly listed deep-tech company in Singapore's relatively young and small Catalist market.

title: T-UP Excellence Award
htmlContent:
The Technology for Enterprise Capability Upgrading (T-Up) programme is a Singapore government-led innovation and R&D support initiative run by A*STAR (Agency for Science, Technology and Research) and partners like AI Singapore.
It is designed to help local SMEs and high-growth startups access specialised scientific and engineering talent to accelerate their research, technology development, and commercial impact.

Under T-Up, industry-relevant A*STAR research scientists and engineers are seconded to companies to work on real product development, build in-house R&D capabilities, and solve technical challenges.

The T-Up Excellence Awards are an annual celebratory component of the T-Up programme that recognises outstanding contributions made by the A*STAR researchers seconded to partner companies. These awards:

  • Celebrate exceptional performance and innovation from scientists & engineers working at enterprises.
  • Highlight projects that have led to meaningful R&D outcomes, new technologies, or improved competitiveness for local companies.
  • Are showcased at events like SME Tech Day and other high-impact innovation forums, amplifying the achievements to government, industry leaders, and the wider research ecosystem.

The awards include specific categories like T-Up Excellence Awards, T-Up Emerging Talent Awards, and T-Up Eagles Awards — each recognising contributions at different levels of experience and impact.

In 2024, MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd was recognised through this programme when an A*STAR research scientist (Dr Egor Khaidarov) seconded to MetaOptics received the T-Up Excellence Award for his work during the collaboration.

This means that the R&D collaboration under T-Up did more than just support MetaOptics' technology projects — it produced substantive innovation outcomes that were noted by A*STAR as:

  • Enhancing internal R&D and product development capabilities.
  • Helping translate research expertise into market-ready technologies.
  • Contributing to the company's competitive edge in a deep-tech domain, such as metalenses and advanced optics.

Why It's Prestigious

1. Government-Backed Recognition

The award is supported by A*STAR — Singapore's premier public research agency — and carries the weight of a national innovation ecosystem endorsement, rather than a purely industry or media award.

2. Innovation Impact Focus

This isn't a generic achievement award — it specifically recognises research translation, product innovation, and real business impact. That highlights MetaOptics' ability to apply cutting-edge science to commercial technology, a core mark of a high-impact deep-tech company.

3. Competitive Selection

Each year, only a small number of projects across all companies participating in T-Up are selected for Excellence Awards, meaning recipients are among the top demonstrations of innovation success through the programme.

4. Visibility & Credibility

Being included in national innovation celebrations like SME Tech Day helps raise visibility among:

  • Government bodies and innovation partner
  • Investors and potential collaborators
  • Industry peers and global partners

This can lead to further opportunities and credibility in both local and regional markets, especially in high-tech sectors.

title: Asia Innovation Cup
subtitle: Startup Innovation Award (2025)
modalTitle: ASIA INNOVATION CUP 2025 – STARTUP INNOVATION Award
htmlContent:
The Asia Innovation Cup is a high-profile innovation competition held as part of “Taiwan Weeks”, a major annual international financial and capital markets event hosted in Taipei, Taiwan. The Cup is organised under the umbrella of multiple key financial institutions including the Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE), Taipei Exchange (TPEx) and other members of Taiwan's capital market ecosystem. Its goal is to:

  • Identify and showcase breakthrough startup companies from across Asia
  • Bridge innovation with capital markets and strategic investors
  • Support technology companies in scaling globally
  • Build a regional innovation platform integrating finance, industry, and entrepreneurship to boost growth potential across sectors in Asia's tech landscape

At the Asia Innovation Cup Demo Day on 21 October 2025 in Taipei, MetaOptics Ltd was awarded the "Startup Innovation Award" — one of the top honours given at the event. This award is presented to a company that stands out among the finalists for its technology innovation, market relevance, and growth potential.

Out of all participants:

  • MetaOptics was one of only 12 finalists selected for final evaluation — a strong achievement in a highly competitive field.
  • From these finalists, MetaOptics was singled out for excellence and won the prestigious Startup Innovation Award, recognising its advanced technology and strategic value.

Winning this award demonstrates that MetaOptics' innovations are not only technologically deep but also perceived as having real commercial and strategic impact across the region. Organisers evaluate finalists on criteria such as:

  • Innovation depth and differentiation
  • Strong R&D and technical execution
  • Scalability of products and market potential
  • Clear strategic vision and ecosystem relevance

For MetaOptics, the award highlights breakthroughs in scalable metalens manufacturing, including capabilities such as direct fabrication of nanostructured optics on large glass wafers — a technical distinction with broad applications in AR/VR, autonomous systems, and next-generation imaging markets.

MetaOptics Technologies Pte Ltd winning the Startup Innovation Award at the 2025 Asia Innovation Cup is a highly prestigious recognition in Asia's innovation ecosystem. It underscores the company's leadership in cutting-edge optical technologies and marks it as one of the region's most promising startups, capable of influencing future markets and attracting strategic capital and partnerships.

title: Emerging Enterprise 2025 Award
subtitle: Finalist
htmlContent:
The Emerging Enterprise Awards are a prestigious business recognition programme presented annually by The Business Times in partnership with OCBC Bank — one of Singapore's largest financial institutions. These awards have been established for many years and are well-respected in the regional startup and SME community.

They recognise young companies with strong growth potential — specifically those that:

  • Demonstrate an enterprising mindset and ambition.
  • Show consistent, significant, and sustainable growth.
  • Exhibit the ability to expand beyond local markets.
  • Deliver excellent business performance and innovation.

Over 600+ of companies across Asia compete for this honor in 2025, with only a select group 30 finalists in 2025 reaching the finalist stage, and even fewer selected as winners.

MetaOptics was chosen as one of the top companies among hundreds of applicants for its performance and potential.

title: Outstanding Startup Award
subtitle: 2024 Recognition
htmlContent:
MetaOptics Technologies has proven its technological viability to the industry, demonstrating the transformative potential of metalenses.

As one of the pioneers of next-generation optical technology, MetaOptics continues to push the boundaries of what is possible in fields such as 3D sensing, computer vision, and AR/VR.
